title: Progress Indicators for Long-Running Operations
scope: v1 ships the Progress helper module + integration in `jarvy update check` and `jarvy hooks {install,update}`. Deep setup_cmd integration (per-tool spinners during rayon parallel install) deferred — needs design to avoid clashing with subprocess streaming stdout.
completionNote: src/progress.rs shipped: Progress / Spinner over indicatif 0.18 with consistent auto-disable rules (non-TTY, --quiet, --format json, sandbox/CI, JARVY_NO_PROGRESS=1). When muted by sandbox/CI, falls through to plain println! so log scrapers still see start/finish lines. is_stdout_tty uses stdlib std::io::IsTerminal — no libc direct dep. Integration today: jarvy update check (network spinner), jarvy hooks install/update.
follow_up: Per-tool spinners during setup_cmd parallel install (needs design — rayon span carry-over + streaming subprocess stdout)
Multi-progress group for `jarvy registry sync` (parallel tool fetches)
